text.title: Agent Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the task have a deterministic success signal (test command, schema validator, rule check)?

branch.when: has_success_signal == true AND subtasks_enumerable == true AND action_reversibility == reversible

conclusion.verdict: Use Plan-and-Execute. Enumerable subtasks + success signal + reversible. Cap max_steps=8.

branch.when: has_success_signal == true AND subtasks_enumerable == true AND action_reversibility != reversible

conclusion.verdict: Escalate. Irreversible actions never go through autonomous loops.

branch.when: has_success_signal == true AND subtasks_enumerable == false AND success_check_stable == true

conclusion.verdict: Use Reflexion. Stable check + unknown subtasks = retry-with-critique pattern.

branch.when: has_success_signal == true AND subtasks_enumerable == false AND success_check_stable == false

conclusion.verdict: Use ReAct. Reflexion without a stable check turns into max_attempts every run.
Use ReAct. No success signal → cannot use Reflexion; reversible actions tolerate exploration. Cap max_iterations=10.
Escalate. No success signal + non-reversible actions = no agent pattern fits.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
